DatabaseSettings.ExtractionQuery: SELECT TOP 100 f.OrderID, f.Quantity, f.UnitPrice, f.SalesAmount, p.ProductName, CONCAT(c.FirstName, ' ', c.LastName) AS NombreCliente, s.StatusName AS Estado, CAST(d.[Date] AS DATE) AS FechaVenta FROM DimDate d JOIN FactSales f ON d.DateKey = f.DateKey JOIN DimCustomer c ON c.CustomerKey = f.CustomerKey JOIN DimProduct p ON p.ProductKey = f.ProductKey JOIN DimOrderStatus s ON s.StatusKey = f.StatusKey;
